description: The 'checkout-service' and 'inventory-service' in the 'ecommerce-core' namespace are stuck in a startup deadlock (0/1 Ready) due to a circular dependency in their readiness probes. Refactor both deployments to use standard Kubernetes httpGet readiness probes that query their own local /health endpoint on port 8080. Ensure both pods reach a 1/1 Ready state. Login to Rancher at https://localhost with credentials admin / Admin12345678!
